zh.lifeSummary: 當John Scott de Calverley, II於1270年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，他的父親Lord John Calverley, I32歲，母親Margaret Warde15歲。他於1326年與Joanna Warde在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1362年在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Scott de Calverley, II于1270年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，他的父亲Lord John Calverley, I32岁，母亲Margaret Warde15岁。他于1326年与Joanna Warde在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1362年在英国英格兰越可爾卡爾福利享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calverley,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Although this was in use as a personal name both before and after the Norman Conquest, modern use in most cases almost certainly represents a transferred use of the surname. This originated as a byname for someone from Scotland or, within Scotland itself, for a member of the Gaelic-speaking people who originally came from Ireland. The given name is now often chosen by parents conscious of their Scottish ancestry and heritage, but it is also used more widely.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Scott de Calverley, II was born in 1270, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Lord John Calverley, I, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Warde, was 15. He married Joanna Warde in 1326, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1362, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Scott de Calverley, II est né en 1270, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Calverley, I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Warde, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Warde en 1326, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1362, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Scott de Calverley, II 1270 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John Calverley, I 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Warde 15. Er hat 1326 in York, Yorkshire, England Joanna Warde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Scott de Calverley, II è nato il nel 1270 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Lord John Calverley, I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Warde, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Warde nel 1326, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1362, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Scott de Calverley, IIが1270年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Lord John Calverley, Iは32歳，母Margaret Wardeは15歳であった。1326年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでJoanna Wardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1362年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Scott de Calverley, II(이)가 1270년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Calverley, I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Warde(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1326년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 Joanna Warde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Scott de Calverley, II nasceu em 1270, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John Calverley, I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Warde, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Warde em 1326, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1362, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Scott de Calverley, II родился в 1270 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John Calverley, I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Warde, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Warde в 1326 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Scott de Calverley, II nació en 1270, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John Calverley, I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Warde, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Joanna Warde en 1326, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1362, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 92 años.
